files.CLAUDE.md:
# growthapp — Agent Instructions

Move fast. Most of what we know lives in commit messages and PR threads.

- Always run `make test` before pushing.

commits.message:
feat: queue-backed background worker

We decided to keep the background worker single threaded because the queue client is not thread safe. The worker entrypoint is `src/worker/run.py`.

feat: card payments

We must redact PAN values before logging anywhere in `src/worker/logging.py`; raw card numbers never go to the log stream.

refactor: drop redis cache (removes redis dependency)

Switched to sqlite for the local dev cache instead of redis; production stays on managed Postgres.

description: A noisy startup repo: one thin CLAUDE.md rule, no ADRs, decisions buried in commit prose and PR threads, plenty of chatter.

comments.body: Going forward we should never log full card numbers anywhere in the worker; mask to last4.

view.body:
## Why

Card data in logs is a compliance incident waiting to happen. We must keep
PAN redaction mandatory in `src/worker/logging.py`; raw card numbers never
reach the log stream.

## Checklist

- [x] tests pass
- [x] redaction unit test added
view.title: Card payment logging hardening
